avenues.name: The control layer — reading errors, tuning gates
avenues.thesis: Neural decoders read the surface code in real time; learned pulses tune real hardware. AI is production machinery in today's quantum stack.

avenues.name: The design layer — codes by search
avenues.thesis: Reinforcement learning discovers error-correcting codes from scratch against the Knill-Laflamme conditions. Search works — and every novelty claim must clear an already-crowded field.

avenues.name: The screening loop — wafers through a cold funnel
avenues.thesis: Cryogenic 300-mm probers test hundreds of spin-qubit devices per wafer at 1.6 K, feeding yield statistics straight back into fabrication. The measure-half of the loop, industrialized.

avenues.name: Self-driving labs — closed loops, open questions
avenues.thesis: Mobile robot chemists run AI-planned campaigns for days unattended — in general materials, not yet on qubits. The flagship's novelty claims were formally corrected in Nature; the label here is the lesson.

avenues.name: The closed loop on qubit metrics
avenues.thesis: Join the halves: AI chooses, robots run, coherence numbers steer. The bet is that this compounds into the qubit pipeline.
avenues.signpost: a closed-loop AI+robotic system credited with a materials or device advance adopted by a leading qubit platform — discovered by the loop, not merely verified by it, by 2031

avenues.name: The dissolving lab
avenues.thesis: Server farms do the theory; robots run the bench; the human job becomes understanding what the machines report.
avenues.signpost: a peer-reviewed quantum-hardware result whose author-contribution statement credits no human with performing the experiment, by 2033

avenues.name: The conceptual gates
avenues.thesis: Whether Majorana qubits exist is a physics question no loop speed settles. The doors iteration cannot open are the survey's honest boundary.

avenues.name: The decade bet — momentum favors China
avenues.thesis: From absent in 2000 to the PPP crossover in 2024: the author's conditional bet that momentum carries China to a commanding quantum-and-AI lead within a decade — unless the US restructures who does its research, how, and at what scale.
avenues.signpost: absent a structural US R&D response, China leads on at least 3 of 4 checkable indices — high-impact quantum publication share, quantum patent families, largest published error-corrected processor, deployed autonomous-lab capacity — by 2036

checks._comment: Single source of truth for the consistency-check RULES. Both index.html's console and verification/verify_numbers.py read these, so a threshold can never drift between the page and the verifier. Change a rule HERE and both sides enforce it on next run. (The check LOGIC is still written in each language — see AUTHORING.md — but the rules it enforces live only here.)
